summary: Iteration 19: PayPal Button Fix (img tag with official logo) and Email Marketing Dashboard - ALL TESTS PASSED (12/12)
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPage.jsx line 424: PayPal button now uses tag with official PayPal CDN logo (paypalobjects.com/webstatic/mktg/Logo/pp-logo-200px.png)
MarketingCommandCenter.jsx: Complete Email Marketing Dashboard with stats cards, CSV import via drag-drop, campaign sending with template dropdown
csv_import.py: Backend handles semicolon-delimited CSV with Firstname+Lastname+Street+Zipcode+City+Phone column mapping
seed_data_creation: Created test CSV imports during testing (cleaned up via DELETE /api/email/csv/queue?source=test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal button fix verified - uses with official PayPal CDN logo (not blurry SVG). Email Marketing Dashboard at /admin/email-marketing fully functional with: 22,895 total contacts, CSV import via drag-drop, campaign sending with template dropdown showing 'Verstuur naar 22,876 contacten', Sources overview showing zonnepanelen_leads with 22,874 contacts.
